item.title: 13/? Mrs. Puff from Apongebob
item.description: “Merciful Neptune!” 13/?? Mrs. Puff from SpongeBob I am doing a costume a day for the entire month and I am raising money for charity while doing so! Read more about it here :) https://imgur.com/gallery/see-y-all-tomorrow-GJKtKLD
item.dc:creator: josiemarcellino

item.title: Memes vol 370 X-Men
item.description:
I’m not sure why I posted this because I do ship Cherik
I think maybe Lucas drew this
YOU MEAN DERISION?!?!
This was the golden age of comics
PRODIGY!!!!
I think he’s writing his name but yeah
BUTCH WOLVERINE
Nessie tax
The blatant favoritism is crazy- Scruffy, Froggy, and Liza Jane tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: "I thought those fighting hard for peace in Gaza would deserve it." - Says Toshiyuki Mimaki, the Japanese anti-nuclear campaigner whose group, Nihon Hidankyo, won the Nobel Peace Prize.
item.description: "The images of the children in Gaza covered with blood, held by their parents remind of Japan 80 years ago."
item.dc:creator: SayNoToGenocide
